heading: Availability of other Federal personnel and data
label: 40309 Availability of other Federal personnel and data
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)40309.42 U.S.C. 2486i, , .Pub. L. 100–147, title II, § 211101 Stat. 875Oct. 30, 1987
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)40309.42 U.S.C. 2486i, , .Pub. L. 100–147, title II, § 211101 Stat. 875Oct. 30, 1987

children.text: may, upon a written request from the Administrator, make available, on a reimbursable basis or otherwise, any personnel (with their consent and without prejudice to their position and rating), service, or facility which the Administrator considers necessary to carry out any provision of this chapter;
may, upon a written request from the Administrator, furnish any available data or other information which the Administrator considers necessary to carry out any provision of this chapter; and
